name: Aperture
description: Camera irises dilating and stopping down across a dark contact sheet — ring thickness morphs between seeds like light being let in.

code.style: --iris: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* the aperture is a disc with a punched hole; the hole size morphs so the iris dilates */ @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 9%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--iris); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(16%, 44%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color0); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
